name: brifo
description: Brifo monorepo: bot-free AI meeting workspace for Mac

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace packages/shared" "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace desktop" "npm run dev --workspace landing-page"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace desktop"
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace landing-page && rm -rf api/_backend && cp -r backend/dist api/_backend && node scripts/generate-api-manifest.js
